content.full_text:
MEMORANDUM

April 17, 1991

TO: ADVICE FILE
    No. M-91-274

FROM: KEVIN S. BRAATEN-MOEN

SUBJECT: TELEPHONE ADVICE TO RATCLIFF RE: WHEN A CORPORATION AND ITS SUBSIDIARY MUST BOTH BE LISTED AS LOBBYIST EMPLOYER

-------------------------------------------------------------

When a corporation employs a lobbyist to lobby on its behalf and on behalf of its wholly-owned subsidiary, both the corporation and the subsidiary must be listed as the lobbyist employer. Information concerning the activities of both entities must be included on their Form 635. ($82039.5)
